name: 02-local-render
title: Local render (Slice 2)
description: Implement confighub render: load profile + templates, render into bundles/.tmp -> atomic-rename to bundles/<profile>/<version>/, write manifest.json with removedFiles and signature placeholder, write checksums.json, enforce forbidden-path rejection and secret-policy rejection, honor state/render.lock advisory PID lock.
creator: Ruichen Zhou
